item.title: Sun TV Network Ltd. Falls 6.78%: Downgrade and Bearish Momentum Shape the Week
item.description: Sun TV Network Ltd. experienced a challenging week on the bourses, closing down 6.78% from Rs.574.00 to Rs.535.10 between 11 and 15 May 2026. This decline outpaced the broader Sensex fall of 2.63% over the same period, reflecting mounting concerns following a downgrade to Sell and a shift in technical momentum towards bearish signals. Despite a late-week bounce, the stock’s performance was weighed down by deteriorating financial metrics and negative market sentiment. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: GRP Ltd Falls 5.16%: Valuation Shift and Mixed Financials Shape Weekly Performance
item.description: GRP Ltd’s stock declined by 5.16% over the week ending 15 May 2026, closing at Rs.1,801 from Rs.1,899, underperforming the Sensex which fell 2.63% during the same period. The week was marked by a significant upgrade in the company’s investment rating from Strong Sell to Sell, reflecting improved valuation metrics amid ongoing financial challenges and mixed returns. Despite the downward price trend, the stock’s valuation shift to a fair grade and long-term outperformance remain notable themes. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Shaily Engineering Plastics Gains 3.51%: 5 Key Factors Driving the Rally
item.description: Shaily Engineering Plastics Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, gaining 3.51% from Rs.2,676.60 to Rs.2,770.60 between 11 and 15 May 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined 2.63% over the same period. The stock hit multiple new 52-week and all-time highs amid positive technical developments and robust financial metrics, signalling sustained investor confidence despite a mixed broader market environment. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: R S Software Gains 1.06% Despite Volatility: 3 Key Events Shaping the Week
item.description: R S Software (India) Ltd experienced a volatile week from 11 to 15 May 2026, closing with a modest gain of 1.06% at Rs.35.22, outperforming the Sensex which declined 2.63% over the same period. The stock’s price action was marked by sharp swings, including a plunge to the lower circuit on 11 May followed by consecutive upper circuit hits on 14 and 15 May, reflecting intense selling and buying pressures amid mixed investor sentiment and regulatory trading restrictions. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Sumeet Industries Ltd Declines 1.56% Despite Technical Upgrades: 4 Key Developments This Week
item.description: Sumeet Industries Ltd experienced a mixed week ending 15 May 2026, with its stock price declining by 1.56% to close at Rs.29.71, outperforming the broader Sensex which fell 2.63%. The week was marked by significant technical developments including a Golden Cross formation, an upgrade in MarketsMOJO rating to Hold, and fluctuating momentum indicators. Despite short-term volatility, the stock’s long-term performance remains exceptional relative to the market. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Sandu Pharmaceuticals Declines 2.37% Despite Valuation Upgrade: 2 Key Factors Driving the Week
item.description: Sandu Pharmaceuticals Ltd closed the week ending 15 May 2026 at Rs.38.39, down 2.37% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.39.32. This underperformance was slightly better than the Sensex’s 2.63% decline over the same period, reflecting a cautious market response to the company’s recent valuation upgrade amidst ongoing operational challenges and subdued financial metrics. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Multi Commodity Exchange Surges 9.50%: 6 Key Factors Driving the Rally
item.description: Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd (MCX) delivered a strong weekly performance, gaining 9.50% from Rs.3,097.15 to Rs.3,391.50 between 11 and 15 May 2026. This rally notably outpaced the Sensex, which declined 2.63% over the same period, underscoring MCX’s resilience amid broader market weakness. The stock hit multiple new 52-week and all-time highs during the week, supported by robust fundamentals, rising institutional interest, and bullish technical indicators. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Nurture Well Industries Falls 3.50%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Nurture Well Industries Ltd experienced a challenging week from 11 to 15 May 2026, with its stock price declining by 3.50% to close at Rs.31.12, slightly underperforming the Sensex which fell 2.63% over the same period. Despite an early upgrade to a Buy rating by MarketsMOJO on 11 May, the stock faced mixed technical signals and volatility, reflecting a complex market environment for this micro-cap FMCG player. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Goldiam International Ltd Falls 13.15%: 4 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Goldiam International Ltd experienced a challenging week from 11 to 15 May 2026, with its share price declining 13.15% to close at Rs.378.50, significantly underperforming the Sensex’s 2.63% fall. The stock faced sharp intraday losses, technical momentum shifts, and valuation concerns amid broader market weakness, marking a week of volatility and consolidation for this small-cap jewellery player. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Arfin India Ltd Falls 5.43%: 5 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Arfin India Ltd experienced a challenging week from 11 to 15 May 2026, with its stock price declining by 5.43% to close at Rs.90.98, underperforming the Sensex which fell 2.63% over the same period. Despite hitting new 52-week and all-time highs early in the week, the stock faced profit-taking and technical pressures amid broader market volatility and sector headwinds. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Siti Networks Ltd Stagnates at Rs.0.49 Despite Market Volatility: 0.00% Weekly Change
item.description: Siti Networks Ltd remained flat at Rs.0.49 throughout the week ending 15 May 2026, registering no price change despite significant market turbulence. While the broader Sensex declined by 2.63%, the stock’s stability amid two circuit limit hits—lower circuit on 13 May and upper circuit on 14 May—highlighted a volatile trading environment marked by heavy selling and speculative buying pressures within this micro-cap media sector stock. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Ujaas Energy Ltd Falls 7.08%: 2 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Ujaas Energy Ltd experienced a challenging week from 11 to 15 May 2026, closing down 7.08% to Rs.145.00, underperforming the Sensex which declined 2.63% over the same period. Despite a strong intraday surge and gap up on 12 May, the stock was unable to sustain momentum, reflecting mixed technical signals amid a broadly bearish market environment. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Supreme Industries Ltd Falls 4.06%: Bearish Momentum and Valuation Shift Shape Weekly Performance
item.description: Supreme Industries Ltd experienced a challenging week, with its stock price declining by 4.06% from ₹3,654.70 to ₹3,506.40, slightly underperforming the broader Sensex which fell 2.63% over the same period. The week was marked by a pronounced bearish technical shift and a valuation adjustment that tempered price attractiveness amid sector headwinds and market volatility. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Omax Autos Ltd Falls 13.65%: 5 Key Factors Driving the Sharp Weekly Decline
item.description: Omax Autos Ltd experienced a turbulent week from 11 to 15 May 2026, with its stock price plunging 13.65% from Rs.237.40 to Rs.205.00, significantly underperforming the Sensex’s 2.63% decline over the same period. Despite hitting a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs.240 on 11 May, the stock faced intense selling pressure and multiple lower circuit hits in the following days, reflecting heightened volatility and investor caution amid mixed technical signals and market conditions. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Shilpa Medicare Gains 9.68%: 4 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Momentum
item.description: Shilpa Medicare Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 9.68% from ₹436.25 to ₹478.50 between 11 and 15 May 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex, which declined 2.63% over the same period. The stock’s gains were supported by a series of positive technical signals, valuation improvements, and robust intraday rallies, culminating in a multi-day surge that underscored its resilience amid broader market volatility. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Om Infra Ltd Falls 9.54%: Mixed Financial Signals and Valuation Shift Shape Week
item.description: Om Infra Ltd’s stock declined sharply by 9.54% over the week ending 15 May 2026, closing at Rs.88.09 from Rs.97.38, underperforming the Sensex which fell 2.63%. The week was marked by mixed financial results showing operational stabilisation but persistent challenges, alongside a modest upgrade in quality and valuation grades that reflect evolving market perceptions amid sector headwinds. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Nitta Gelatin India Ltd Gains 4.23%: Key Milestones and Market Resilience in a Volatile Week
item.description: Nitta Gelatin India Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, gaining 4.23% from Rs.1,273.70 to Rs.1,327.60 between 11 and 15 May 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined 2.63% over the same period. The stock’s resilience was highlighted by a new 52-week and all-time high reached on 11 May, supported by robust technical indicators and solid financial results, despite a broadly weak market backdrop. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Dhanlaxmi Bank Ltd Falls 3.23%: 4 Key Factors Shaping This Week’s Movement
item.description: Dhanlaxmi Bank Ltd’s stock closed the week down 3.23% at Rs.31.18, underperforming the Sensex which declined 2.63% over the same period. The week saw a mix of technical developments, valuation reassessments, and an upgrade in analyst ratings that together shaped the stock’s volatile price action. Despite a midweek rally sparked by a bullish Golden Cross formation, profit-taking and cautious sentiment prevailed towards the week’s close, reflecting a complex interplay of optimism and caution among investors. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Enterprises Gains 8.39%: 5 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Rally
item.description: Adani Enterprises Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, gaining 8.39% from Rs.2,505.65 on 11 May to Rs.2,715.90 on 15 May 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined 2.63% over the same period. The stock’s trajectory was marked by a sharp rebound midweek, new 52-week highs, and robust trading volumes, reflecting a mix of technical strength and renewed investor interest amid a cautious broader market environment. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Mukesh Babu Financial Services Ltd Falls 3.27%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Week
item.description: Mukesh Babu Financial Services Ltd experienced a volatile week, closing at Rs.125.75 on 15 May 2026, down 3.27% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.130.00. Despite this decline, the stock outperformed the Sensex, which fell 2.63% over the same period. The week was marked by a new 52-week high, a technical upgrade by MarketsMOJO, and disappointing quarterly results that raised concerns about the company’s long-term viability. Time: 33 minutes ago
